category_sources: Official repository is an InfluxData Go project for pkg-config integration.
source_facts.description: Easier way to include C code in your Go program.
display_name_sources: Homebrew formula name in source_facts.id is brew:pkg-config-wrapper.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available documentation surface for the project.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/influxdata/pkg-config, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C code integration for Go programs.
source_facts.executables lists pkg-config-wrapper as the command-line executable.
